payload.description: Report provides statistics regarding major felonies and hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system

tool_args.label: Report purpose: provide major felony and hate crime statistics
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system. The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

payload.claim_text: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies (including homicide, robbery, assault, and rape) in addition to hate crimes occurring in the NYCT Subway system
